# Soil and Crop Module
XXXXXXXXX 


More text
## Introduction 

## Field Management 

### Introduction 

### Methodology

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs




## Soil Management 

### Introduction 

### Methodology

### Soil Erosion

### Soil Nitrogen

### Soil Phosphorus Cycling

### Soil Carbon Cycling

#### Relevant Inputs

#### Relevant Outputs




## Crop Management 

### Introduction

### Methodology
